description.value:
Additionally, at 1st level, you are able to better control and release your innate wukong fury, using it as a tool to defeat your foes in combat.

You gain access to a new resource exclusive to your clan known as Ikari Dice. Each Ikari Die is equal to a d6 and can be spent on a variety of features within this clan, however you may also choose to spend any number of Ikari Dice anytime you were to deal your unarmed damage. When you do so, you roll all spent Ikari Dice and add the result to the damage dealt. You may have a maximum number of Ikari Dice at once equal to your proficiency bonus.

At the beginning of a combat you start off with 0 Ikari Dice, instead you are able to gain Ikari Dice in the following ways, losing all Ikari Dice gained at the end of combat:

  • Whenever you gain any ranks of Berserk, you gain a number of Ikari Dice equal to the total ranks of Berserk you gained. You may choose to automatically fail any checks or saves in association to gaining the Berserk condition.
  • Twice per round, whenever you take damage you gain 1 Ikari Die.
  • Whenever a creature were to land a critical hit on you or a allied creature you can see, you gain 1 Ikari Die. This is regardless of if the critical hit successfully did damage or not.
  • The first time your health is reduced to 50% or below per combat, you gain 2 Ikari Dice.
